sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ طِفْلٌ اسْمُهُ أَدَمٌ إِلَى السُّوقِ مَعَ جَدَّتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Dječak po imenu Adem otišao je na pijac sa svojom bakom.
sentences.translationEn: A boy named Adam went to the market with his grandmother.

sentences.arabic: فَجَأَةً لَمْ يَجِدِ الْجَدَّةَ بِجَانِبِهِ وَخَافَ.
sentences.translation: Odjednom nije pronašao baku pored sebe i uplašio se.
sentences.translationEn: Suddenly he could not find his grandmother beside him and got scared.

sentences.arabic: تَذَكَّرَ أَنَّ الْجَدَّةَ قَالَتْ: «إِذَا ضَعْتَ انْتَظِرْ عِنْدَ بَابِ السُّوقِ».
sentences.translation: Sjetio se da je baka rekla: «Ako se izgubiš čekaj kod vrata pijaca».
sentences.translationEn: He remembered his grandmother said: «If you get lost, wait at the market gate».

sentences.arabic: وَقَفَ عِنْدَ الْبَابِ وَبَعْدَ قَلِيلٍ جَاءَتِ الْجَدَّةُ وَاحْتَضَنَتْهُ.
sentences.translation: Stao je kod vrata i ubrzo je baka došla i zagrlila ga.
sentences.translationEn: He stood at the gate and soon his grandmother came and hugged him.
